## nsc ingress generate-access-token

Generate a Namespace Cloud token to access a preview for the current workspace.

```
nsc ingress generate-access-token [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help               help for generate-access-token
      --instance string    Limit the access token to this instance.
      --output_to string   If specified, write the access token to this path.
```
